name: @stackra/devtools
purpose: Enterprise developer overlay — launcher pill, drawer/panel shell, @DevtoolsPanel contribution, inspector, keyboard shortcut, HeroUI Pro UI.
capabilities: HeroUI Pro (web) + HeroUI Native Pro (native) UI
Tree-shakes to zero bytes in production builds
Testing subpath with in-memory panel mocks
when_to_use: Adding a developer-facing overlay for inspecting state, network, cache, or DI wiring during development.
when_not_to_use: For end-user telemetry use @stackra/monitoring; for production observability use the backend observability packages.
